market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: The agentic CFO in your pocket
articles.description: Chalom explains that retail investors have never had the opportunity to access and manage their own digital treasury desk. Until now.

articles.title: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with OKX
articles.description: ICE and OKX plan to launch oil-linked perpetual futures based on Brent and WTI benchmarks, bringing crypto derivatives further into traditional energy markets under licensing restrictions.

articles.title: Trump Mobile confirms it exposed customers’ personal data, including phone numbers and home addresses
articles.description: President Trump’s branded cell phone maker and cell provider said the exposure was linked to a third-party platform, and was evaluating whether it needs to notify customers.

articles.title: Bitcoin miner MARA spent $4.3M on CEO security in 2025 as crypto attacks rise
articles.description: MARA spent $4.3 million on CEO Fred Thiel’s security in 2025, including vehicle armoring, as crypto wrench attacks increased globally.

articles.title: Meta quietly launches a new Reddit-like app called Forum
articles.description: The company describes the app as a "dedicated space built for deeper discussions, real answers and communities you care about."

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin continues holding pattern near $77,000 ahead of Kevin Warsh taking over at Fed
articles.description: Kevin Warsh is set to be sworn as Fed chairman in a White House ceremony on Friday morning.

articles.title: Smart ring maker Oura files to go public
articles.description: The Finnish company said in September that it has sold 5.5 million smart rings to date.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Space X IPO: 'Bad news' for tech stocks but what about Bitcoin?
articles.description: SpaceX’s IPO could turn the Mag 7 into a Mag 8, with Tesla and SpaceX comprising 25% of the group's Bitcoin balance-sheet exposure.

articles.title: DeFi hacks shake institutional confidence as risks outpace yields
articles.description: Repeated bridge exploits and shrinking yields are making institutions question whether DeFi’s risks still justify the returns, says Symbiotic’s Putiatin.

articles.title: THORChain exploit tied to malicious node and GG20 flaw
articles.description: The $10.7 million THORChain exploit was caused by a GG20 vulnerability, which allowed a malicious node to reconstruct a full private key to one of its vaults.

articles.title: Audio generation app Huxe, founded by former NotebookLM developers, shuts down
articles.description: Huxe said that it has pulled its app from App Store and Play Store, and that it will stop working later this month

articles.title: IREN co-founder says AI’s biggest bottleneck is infrastructure, not chips
articles.description: Dan Roberts outlines IREN’s strategy to build a vertically integrated AI platform spanning power, data centers, GPUs and enterprise software.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR surges 19.4% as index trades flat
articles.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 4.3% from Thursday, joined NEAR Protocol (NEAR) as a top performer.

articles.title: Trump Media moves another $205 million in bitcoin as losses on crypto bet swell to $455 million
articles.description: DJT’s bitcoin strategy remains under pressure as the company sits on hundreds of millions in unrealized crypto losses and widening quarterly deficits.

articles.title: Tom Lee says trillions in tech IPO supply won't crash the S&P 500
articles.description: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee argues that trillions in new IPO supply from SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI could ultimately be absorbed by underallocated investors.

articles.title: OKX and ICE are bringing 'never-expiring' oil futures to 120 million crypto users
articles.description: The new partnership comes as Hyperliquid’s oli futures contracts that never expire have been a huge success with over $1.6 billion in 24-hour trading volume.

articles.title: 韓國 SSD 控制器廠商 FADU 進軍台灣，競爭AI 資料中心市場商機
articles.description: 隨著生成式 AI 與 AI 資料中心需求快速成長，高效能、低功耗的資料儲存架構已成為全球雲端產業的關鍵基礎。來 […]

articles.title: IBM 與美國商務部各投資 10 億美元，攜手打造首座 12 吋量子晶圓代工廠
articles.description: IBM 與美國商務部近日宣布簽署意向書，將攜手打造美國首家純量力 （pure-play） 量子晶片代工廠- A […]

articles.title: 擴大與高通合作！Stellantis 新一代汽車架構導入 Snapdragon 數位底盤
